'''Ku'amar''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] and the cousin of [[Tru'eb Cholakk]]. Ku'amar kidnapped Tru'eb and gave him to [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]], thus preventing Tru'eb from fulfilling his dream of becoming a head-clan member of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Kala'uun/Legends|Kala'uun]].<ref name="Big Quince" />
